source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.4 - M61A2 Gun (Air-to-Ground)

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Select Gun Rounds Options (MK-50 or PGU-28 rounds)
Set Gun Firing Rate Option (HI = 6000 rounds per minute, LO = 4000 rounds per minute)
Set Gun Mode to CCIP (text should be boxed) Gun Reticle Pipper CCIP Mode Selected Gun Selected & Armed Gun Rounds Remaining
Set center of gun reticle on target and wait for the « IN RNG » (In Range) cue to appear.
Once you have done your run and the Breakaway X appears, break off the attack and wave off from target. In Range Cue Breakaway X
